title: A Court of Thorns and Roses
author: Sarah J. Maas
image: A Court of Thorns and Roses.jpg
description: When nineteen-year-old Feyre kills a wolf in the woods, a terrifying creature arrives to demand retribution. Dragged to a magical land she knows only from legends, Feyre discovers a world of faeries, danger, and a love that could change her fate forever.

title: The Hobbit
author: J.R.R. Tolkien
description: Bilbo Baggins lives a quiet, comfortable life until the wizard Gandalf and a group of dwarves draw him into an epic quest. From trolls to dragons, Bilbo’s journey takes him far beyond the comforts of home and into legend.

title: Shadow and Bone
author: Leigh Bardugo
description: Orphaned soldier Alina Starkov discovers a dormant power that could be the key to saving her war-torn world. Thrust into a glittering court of magic and danger, she must learn who to trust before darkness consumes everything.

title: The Name of the Wind
author: Patrick Rothfuss
description: Kvothe recounts his life story—from a gifted child in a troupe of traveling players to a notorious wizard. Filled with music, magic, and mystery, this is the tale of how legends are born.

title: Percy Jackson & the Olympians: The Lightning Thief
author: Rick Riordan
description: Twelve-year-old Percy Jackson discovers he is the son of a Greek god. Accused of stealing Zeus’s lightning bolt, Percy must race against time to stop a war among the gods and uncover the truth about his identity.
